name: Locus Workspace
summary: Canvas workspace for organizing Unity asset and scene references.

summaryI18n.zh: 用于组织 Unity 资源和场景引用的画布工作区。
summaryI18n.en: Canvas workspace for organizing Unity asset and scene references.

author: r1n7aro
description: Locus Workspace provides a persistent canvas board for collecting Unity assets and scene references into pages. It supports drag-and-drop, asset search, selection, and inspection from saved blocks.

descriptionI18n.zh: Locus Workspace 提供持久化画布，用于按页面收集 Unity 资源和场景引用，支持拖拽、资源搜索、选择和检查保存的区块。
descriptionI18n.en: Locus Workspace provides a persistent canvas board for collecting Unity assets and scene references into pages. It supports drag-and-drop, asset search, selection, and inspection from saved blocks.
